page.content: In the analysis of container shipping rate trends for FedEx Corporation, the data from the 5-Year CAGR reveals significant insights. The year 2021 recorded a Q1 Rate of 1200CHF, Q2 Rate of 1250CHF, Q3 Rate of 1300CHF, and Q4 Rate of 1280CHF, culminating in an Annual Rate of 1257.5CHF with no applicable CAGR. In 2022, the Q1 Rate was 1250CHF, Q2 Rate rose to 1300CHF, Q3 Rate reached 1350CHF, and Q4 Rate was 1330CHF, yielding an Annual Rate of 1285CHF and a CAGR of 2.2%. The year 2023 showed a Q1 Rate of 1300CHF, Q2 Rate of 1350CHF, Q3 Rate of 1400CHF, Q4 Rate of 1380CHF, resulting in an Annual Rate of 1332.5CHF and a CAGR of 3.7%. For 2024, the Q1 Rate was 1350CHF, Q2 Rate 1400CHF, Q3 Rate 1450CHF, and Q4 Rate 1430CHF, producing an Annual Rate of 1395CHF with a CAGR of 4.7%. The projected 2025 Q1 Rate of 1400CHF, Q2 Rate of 1450CHF, Q3 Rate of 1500CHF, and Q4 Rate of 1480CHF resulted in an Annual Rate of 1457.5CHF and a CAGR of 5.3%. Finally, 2026 reflected a Q1 Rate of 1450CHF, Q2 Rate of 1500CHF, Q3 Rate of 1550CHF, and Q4 Rate of 1530CHF, culminating in an Annual Rate of 1507.5CHF and a CAGR of 6.0%.

page.content: The rail network utilization indicates a Freight Transport Utilization Rate of 75% with a CAGR of 5.2%, and a Passenger Transport Utilization Rate of 60% with a CAGR of 3.8%. Regarding maintenance status, Track A is rated Good and last inspected on 2023-01-15, Track B is Fair with inspection on 2023-03-10, and Track C is Poor, last inspected on 2022-11-05. Investment needed totals CHF2M, with a budget allocated of CHF1.5M and projected growth indicating a 5% increase.
